purpose: Tell FATHIYA exactly what to ask for or collect before attempting to find simple or complex vulnerabilities.
principle: Ask for what cannot be safely discovered. Collect only what is public, operator-provided, owned, or explicitly allowed by the program policy.

minimum_required_for_live_bug_bounty.ask_operator: أرسلي رابط برنامج HackerOne/Bugcrowd أو نص النطاق الرسمي.
minimum_required_for_live_bug_bounty.may_collect: Fetch public program policy URL if provided.

minimum_required_for_live_bug_bounty.ask_operator: حددي الهدف داخل النطاق: domain, subdomain, API base URL, mobile app, repository, or local lab.
minimum_required_for_live_bug_bounty.may_collect: Extract targets from provided program policy only.

minimum_required_for_live_bug_bounty.ask_operator: ما الاختبارات المسموحة؟ passive فقط، active low-noise، authenticated، API، mobile، WebSocket، SSRF callback، أو غيرها؟
minimum_required_for_live_bug_bounty.may_collect: Parse from program policy if present.

minimum_required_for_live_bug_bounty.ask_operator: ما الحد الأعلى للطلبات والقيود على الفحص الآلي؟
لـ IDOR/BOLA/business logic/WebSocket أحتاج حسابين مصرحين أو fixtures: مستخدم A ومستخدم B وأدوارهما.
minimum_required_for_live_bug_bounty.may_collect: Do not collect credentials from the web. Only operator-provided or program-provided test accounts.

minimum_required_for_live_bug_bounty.ask_operator: إذا الهدف API، أرسلي OpenAPI/Swagger/Postman collection أو رابط docs المسموح.
minimum_required_for_live_bug_bounty.may_collect: Fetch public docs only when in scope or linked by policy.

minimum_required_for_live_bug_bounty.ask_operator: ما البيانات التجريبية المسموحة؟ وما الذي يجب إخفاؤه من التقرير؟
minimum_required_for_live_bug_bounty.blocks_active_testing_if_missing: blocks tests that would touch private data

minimum_required_for_live_bug_bounty.ask_operator: لـ SSRF/blind callbacks، هل يوجد endpoint تحكم مصرح وآمن؟
minimum_required_for_live_bug_bounty.may_collect: Do not create or use third-party callback services unless approved by scope and operator.

minimum_required_for_live_bug_bounty.ask_operator: إذا الهدف mobile، أحتاج APK/IPA/TestFlight or app store link plus allowed test boundaries.
minimum_required_for_live_bug_bounty.may_collect: Fetch public app metadata only; app binary handling needs local workflow.

minimum_required_for_live_bug_bounty.ask_operator: أين نرسل التقرير لاحقًا؟ HackerOne/Bugcrowd form, email, internal ticket, or draft only.
minimum_required_for_live_bug_bounty.may_collect: Parse reporting channel from program policy.

can_collect_automatically_when_allowed: public OpenAPI docs linked by target
must_ask_operator: private program scope text not publicly accessible

missing_requirement_response_template.arabic: أقدر أكمل التخطيط الآن، لكن لا أبدأ فحص حي حتى يتوفر: {missing_items}. المسموح الآن: {allowed_now}. بعد توفيرها سأنتقل إلى: {next_phase}.
missing_requirement_response_template.english: I can continue planning now, but I will not start live testing until these are available: {missing_items}. Allowed now: {allowed_now}. Once provided, I will move to: {next_phase}.
